title: Scoville NEVERSTICK 38cm Baking Tray, Large Non Stick Oven Tray, 38cm x 27cm, Rectangular Baking Sheet, Easy to Clean, Oven Safe to 260°C, Dishwasher Safe, PFOA Free, Toughened Aluminium, Black
features: 38CM BAKING TRAY: Upgrade your baking game with the Scoville Neverstick 38cm baking tray – perfectly sized for larger, family-sized portions. Whether it’s oven chips, roasted vegetables, or a batch of chocolate cookies, this versatile tray handles it all with ease. Crafted from high-quality, toughened aluminium, it delivers superior durability and even heat distribution for perfectly baked results every time. A must-have for any family kitchen.

SUPER STRONG NON-STICK: Thanks to Scoville’s renowned Neverstick technology, tested to be 5X stronger than other non-sticks, this tray ensures hassle-free baking without the need for oil or butter—perfect for healthier meals and effortless food release. Plus, Neverstick bakeware is flake, peel, and PFOA-free, so you can bake your favourite dishes with complete confidence every time.
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher safe for everyday convenience, though hand washing is recommended. For best results, clean with a soft sponge and warm, soapy water—and watch any food debris lift right off.

SUITABLE FOR ALL OVENS: Neverstick bakeware is compatible with all household ovens and can withstand temperatures up to 260°C, giving you the flexibility to bake and roast a wide variety of delicious dishes.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: Scoville offers a lifetime guarantee with this product, covering any manufacturing defects or material issues under normal household use. For care instructions, guarantee registration, and more details, please visit Scoville’s website.
